info.name: Connectra GraphQL API (via Appointment360)
info.description: GraphQL equivalent of Connectra REST API. Same folder structure. Setup: baseUrl, email, password. Run Auth > Login first. All requests use Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}. Variables: use camelCase. API docs: lambda/appointment360/sql/apis/ (03_CONTACTS_MODULE.md, 04_COMPANIES_MODULE.md).

body.raw: {"query": "mutation Login($input:LoginInput!){ auth{ login(input:$input){ accessToken refreshToken user{ uuid email name}}}}", "variables": {"input": {"email": "{{email}}", "password": "{{password}}"}}}

request.description: REST Connectra uses X-API-Key; Appointment360 uses JWT. Run first.

body.raw: {"query": "query{ health{ apiHealth{ status environment}}}", "variables": {}}

request.description: REST: GET /health → GraphQL: health.apiHealth

body.raw: {"query": "mutation BatchCreateContacts($input:BatchCreateContactsInput!){ contacts{ batchCreateContacts(input:$input){ uuid firstName lastName email}}}", "variables": {"input": {"contacts": [{"firstName": "John", "lastName": "Doe", "email": "john.doe@acme.com", "companyUuid": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890", "title": "Senior Software Engineer", "departments": ["Engineering"], "seniority": "senior"}]}}}

request.description: REST: POST /contacts/batch-upsert → GraphQL: contacts.batchCreateContacts

body.raw: {"query": "query ContactQuery($query:VQLQueryInput!){ contacts{ contactQuery(query:$query){ items{ uuid firstName lastName email title} total limit offset}}}", "variables": {"query": {"filters": {"conditions": [{"field": "country", "operator": "in", "value": ["united states"]}, {"field": "seniority", "operator": "eq", "value": "senior"}]}, "selectColumns": ["uuid", "first_name", "last_name", "email", "title"], "limit": 25}}}

request.description: REST: POST /contacts/ with VQL → GraphQL: contacts.contactQuery

body.raw: {"query": "mutation UpdateContact($uuid:ID!,$input:UpdateContactInput!){ contacts{ updateContact(uuid:$uuid,input:$input){ uuid firstName lastName email title}}}", "variables": {"uuid": "{{contactUuid}}", "input": {"firstName": "John", "lastName": "Doe", "email": "john.doe@acme.com", "title": "Senior Engineering Manager", "departments": ["Engineering", "Product"], "seniority": "lead"}}}

request.description: REST: POST /contacts/batch-upsert with uuid → GraphQL: contacts.updateContact(uuid, input)

body.raw: {"query": "mutation CreateCompany($input:CreateCompanyInput!){ companies{ createCompany(input:$input){ uuid name industries employeesCount website}}}", "variables": {"input": {"name": "Acme Corporation", "employeesCount": 500, "industries": ["Technology", "Software"], "keywords": ["SaaS", "B2B", "Enterprise"]}}}

request.description: REST: POST /companies/batch-upsert → GraphQL: companies.createCompany

body.raw: {"query": "query CompanyQuery($query:VQLQueryInput!){ companies{ companyQuery(query:$query){ items{ uuid name industries employeesCount website} total limit offset}}}", "variables": {"query": {"filters": {"conditions": [{"field": "country", "operator": "in", "value": ["united states"]}, {"field": "industries", "operator": "in", "value": ["Technology"]}, {"field": "employees_count", "operator": "gte", "value": 100}, {"field": "employees_count", "operator": "lte", "value": 5000}]}, "selectColumns": ["uuid", "name", "industries", "employees_count", "website"], "limit": 25}}}

request.description: REST: POST /companies/ with VQL → GraphQL: companies.companyQuery

body.raw: {"query": "mutation UpdateCompany($uuid:ID!,$input:UpdateCompanyInput!){ companies{ updateCompany(uuid:$uuid,input:$input){ uuid name industries employeesCount}}}", "variables": {"uuid": "{{companyUuid}}", "input": {"name": "Acme Corporation", "employeesCount": 750, "industries": ["Technology", "Software", "AI"]}}}

request.description: REST: POST /companies/batch-upsert with uuid → GraphQL: companies.updateCompany(uuid, input)

body.raw: {"query": "query($query:VQLQueryInput!){ companies{ companyQuery(query:$query){ items{ uuid name industries employeesCount annualRevenue totalFunding city country website} total limit offset}}}", "variables": {"query": {"filters": {"conditions": [{"field": "name", "operator": "contains", "value": "software"}]}, "limit": 25, "page": 1}}}

request.description: REST: POST /companies/ → GraphQL: companies.companyQuery. Basic - Simple Name Search

body.raw: {"query": "query($query:VQLQueryInput!){ companies{ companyQuery(query:$query){ items{ uuid name industries employeesCount annualRevenue totalFunding city country website} total limit offset}}}", "variables": {"query": {"filters": {"conditions": [{"field": "name", "operator": "contains", "value": "technology"}, {"field": "industries", "operator": "in", "value": ["Software", "Technology"]}, {"field": "country", "operator": "in", "value": ["united states"]}, {"field": "employees_count", "operator": "gte", "value": 50}, {"field": "employees_count", "operator": "lte", "value": 1000}, {"field": "annual_revenue", "operator": "gte", "value": 1000000}]}, "orderBy": [{"orderBy": "employees_count", "orderDirection": "desc"}], "limit": 25, "page": 1, "selectColumns": ["name", "employees_count", "industries", "city", "country"]}}}

request.description: REST: POST /companies/ → GraphQL: companies.companyQuery. Combined - Multi-Criteria Search

body.raw: {"query": "query($query:VQLQueryInput!){ companies{ companyQuery(query:$query){ items{ uuid name industries employeesCount annualRevenue totalFunding city country website} total limit offset}}}", "variables": {"query": {"filters": {"conditions": [{"field": "name", "operator": "exact", "value": "artificial intelligence"}]}, "limit": 25, "page": 1}}}

request.description: REST: POST /companies/ → GraphQL: companies.companyQuery. Exact - Phrase Match with Slop

item.name: Search Companies - Shuffle with OR Operator

body.raw: {"query": "query($query:VQLQueryInput!){ companies{ companyQuery(query:$query){ items{ uuid name industries employeesCount annualRevenue totalFunding city country website} total limit offset}}}", "variables": {"query": {"filters": {"conditions": [{"field": "name", "operator": "contains", "value": "software technology saas"}]}, "limit": 25, "page": 1}}}

request.description: REST: POST /companies/ → GraphQL: companies.companyQuery. Search Companies - Shuffle with OR Operator

body.raw: {"query": "query($query:VQLQueryInput!){ companies{ companyQuery(query:$query){ items{ uuid name industries employeesCount annualRevenue totalFunding city country website} total limit offset}}}", "variables": {"query": {"filters": {"conditions": [{"field": "name", "operator": "starts_with", "value": "soft"}]}, "selectColumns": ["uuid", "name", "employees_count"], "limit": 25, "page": 1}}}

request.description: REST: POST /companies/ → GraphQL: companies.companyQuery. Search Companies by Name (Substring)

body.raw: {"query": "query($query:VQLQueryInput!){ companies{ companyQuery(query:$query){ items{ uuid name industries employeesCount annualRevenue totalFunding city country website} total limit offset}}}", "variables": {"query": {"filters": {"conditions": [{"field": "name", "operator": "contains", "value": "artificial intelligence"}, {"field": "industries", "operator": "in", "value": ["Software", "Technology"]}, {"field": "technologies", "operator": "in", "value": ["Python", "Machine Learning"]}, {"field": "employees_count", "operator": "gte", "value": 100}, {"field": "employees_count", "operator": "lte", "value": 1000}, {"field": "annual_revenue", "operator": "gte", "value": 5000000}]}, "orderBy": [{"orderBy": "annual_revenue", "orderDirection": "desc"}], "limit": 50, "page": 1}}}

request.description: REST: POST /companies/ → GraphQL: companies.companyQuery. Complex Company Search with must_not

body.raw: {"query": "query($query:VQLQueryInput!){ companies{ companyQuery(query:$query){ items{ uuid name industries employeesCount annualRevenue totalFunding city country website} total limit offset}}}", "variables": {"query": {"filters": {"conditions": [{"field": "industries", "operator": "in", "value": ["Software", "Technology"]}, {"field": "employees_count", "operator": "gte", "value": 50}]}, "orderBy": [{"orderBy": "annual_revenue", "orderDirection": "desc"}, {"orderBy": "uuid", "orderDirection": "asc"}], "searchAfter": ["5000000", "123"], "limit": 25}}}

request.description: REST: POST /companies/ → GraphQL: companies.companyQuery. Get Companies with Cursor Pagination

body.raw: {"query": "query($query:VQLQueryInput!){ companies{ companyQuery(query:$query){ items{ uuid name industries employeesCount annualRevenue totalFunding city country website} total limit offset}}}", "variables": {"query": {"filters": {"conditions": [{"field": "industries", "operator": "in", "value": ["Software"]}]}, "limit": 25, "page": 1}}}

request.description: REST: POST /contacts/ → GraphQL: contacts.contactQuery. Sales Outreach - Decision Makers at Target Accounts

body.raw: {"query": "query($query:VQLQueryInput!){ contacts{ contactQuery(query:$query){ items{ uuid firstName lastName email title departments seniority emailStatus} total limit offset}}}", "variables": {"query": {"filters": {"conditions": [{"field": "country", "operator": "in", "value": ["united states"]}]}, "orderBy": [{"orderBy": "last_name", "orderDirection": "asc"}, {"orderBy": "uuid", "orderDirection": "asc"}], "searchAfter": ["smith", "abc-123"], "limit": 25}}}

request.description: REST: POST /contacts/ → GraphQL: contacts.contactQuery. Get Contacts with Cursor Pagination

body.raw: {"query": "query($query:VQLQueryInput!){ contacts{ contactQuery(query:$query){ items{ uuid firstName lastName email title departments seniority emailStatus} total limit offset}}}", "variables": {"query": {"limit": 25, "page": 1, "offset": 0}}}

request.description: REST: POST /contacts/ → GraphQL: contacts.contactQuery. Pagination - Page-Based (First Page)

body.raw: {"query": "query($query:VQLQueryInput!){ contacts{ contactQuery(query:$query){ items{ uuid firstName lastName email title departments seniority emailStatus} total limit offset}}}", "variables": {"query": {"orderBy": [{"orderBy": "seniority", "orderDirection": "desc"}, {"orderBy": "last_name", "orderDirection": "asc"}], "limit": 25, "page": 1}}}

request.description: REST: POST /contacts/ → GraphQL: contacts.contactQuery. Pagination - Page-Based (Multiple Sorts)

body.raw: {"query": "query($query:VQLQueryInput!){ contacts{ contactQuery(query:$query){ items{ uuid firstName lastName email title departments seniority emailStatus} total limit offset}}}", "variables": {"query": {"filters": {"conditions": [{"field": "departments", "operator": "in", "value": ["Engineering"]}]}, "orderBy": [{"orderBy": "seniority", "orderDirection": "desc"}, {"orderBy": "uuid", "orderDirection": "asc"}], "searchAfter": ["senior", "uuid-here"], "limit": 25}}}

request.description: REST: POST /contacts/ → GraphQL: contacts.contactQuery. Pagination - Cursor with Multiple Sorts

request.description: REST: POST /contacts/ → GraphQL: contacts.contactQuery. Select Columns - All Core Fields

request.description: REST: POST /contacts/ → GraphQL: contacts.contactQuery. Select Columns - With Metadata Fields

body.raw: {"query": "query{ contacts{ filters{ items{ filterKey filterType} total}}}", "variables": {}}

request.description: REST: GET /common/contacts/filters → GraphQL: contacts.filters

body.raw: {"query": "query($input:ContactFilterDataInput!){ contacts{ filterData(input:$input){ items{ value count} total}}}", "variables": {"input": {"filterKey": "departments", "searchText": "", "page": 1, "limit": 20}}}

request.description: REST: POST /common/contacts/filters/data → GraphQL: contacts.filterData(input)

body.raw: {"query": "mutation BatchCreateContacts($input:BatchCreateContactsInput!){ contacts{ batchCreateContacts(input:$input){ uuid firstName lastName email}}}", "variables": {"input": {"contacts": [{"firstName": "John", "lastName": "Doe", "email": "john.doe@acme.com", "title": "Senior Engineer"}, {"firstName": "Jane", "lastName": "Smith", "email": "jane.smith@tech.io", "title": "Product Manager"}]}}}

request.description: REST: POST /contacts/batch-upsert → GraphQL: contacts.batchCreateContacts

body.raw: {"query": "mutation CreateContact360Import($input:CreateContact360ImportInput!){ jobs{ createContact360Import(input:$input){ id jobId jobType status createdAt}}}", "variables": {"input": {"s3Key": "uploads/{{userId}}/contacts_import_2024.csv", "outputPrefix": "imports/contact360/", "chunkCount": 8, "retryCount": 3, "retryInterval": 5}}}

request.description: REST: POST /common/batch-upsert (CSV) → GraphQL: jobs.createContact360Import. SuperAdmin only.

body.raw: {"query": "mutation InitiateUpload($input:InitiateUploadInput!){ upload{ initiateUpload(input:$input){ uploadId fileKey}}}", "variables": {"input": {"filename": "contacts_import_2024.csv", "contentType": "text/csv"}}}

request.description: REST: GET /common/upload-url → GraphQL: upload.initiateUpload. Then upload.presignedUrl(uploadId, partNumber) for each part.

body.raw: {"query": "query PresignedUrl($uploadId:String!,$partNumber:Int!){ upload{ presignedUrl(uploadId:$uploadId,partNumber:$partNumber)}}", "variables": {"uploadId": "{{uploadId}}", "partNumber": 1}}

request.description: For multipart upload: call after initiateUpload for each part.

body.raw: {"query": "mutation CreateContact360Import($input:CreateContact360ImportInput!){ jobs{ createContact360Import(input:$input){ id jobId jobType status createdAt}}}", "variables": {"input": {"s3Key": "uploads/contacts.csv", "outputPrefix": "imports/", "chunkCount": 8, "retryCount": 3, "retryInterval": 5}}}

request.description: REST: POST /common/jobs/create (insert_csv_file) → GraphQL: jobs.createContact360Import

item.name: Create Job - Export Contacts to CSV

body.raw: {"query": "mutation CreateContact360Export($input:CreateContact360ExportInput!){ contacts{ exportContacts(input:$input){ id jobId jobType status createdAt}}}", "variables": {"input": {"outputPrefix": "exports/contact360/", "service": "contact", "vql": {"where": {"keyword_match": {"must": {"country": ["united states"], "email_status": ["verified"]}}}, "select_columns": ["first_name", "last_name", "email", "title", "company_id"], "order_by": [{"order_by": "uuid", "order_direction": "desc"}], "limit": 500}, "sliceCount": 4, "pageSize": 1000, "retryCount": 2}}}

request.description: REST: POST /common/jobs/create (export_csv_file, contact) → GraphQL: contacts.exportContacts

item.name: Create Job - Export Companies to CSV

body.raw: {"query": "mutation CreateContact360Export($input:CreateContact360ExportInput!){ companies{ exportCompanies(input:$input){ id jobId jobType status createdAt}}}", "variables": {"input": {"outputPrefix": "exports/contact360/", "service": "company", "vql": {"where": {"keyword_match": {"must": {"industries": ["Software", "SaaS"], "country": ["united states"]}}}, "range_query": {"must": {"employees_count": {"gte": 50, "lte": 1000}, "annual_revenue": {"gte": 1000000}}}, "select_columns": ["uuid", "name", "employees_count", "annual_revenue", "industries", "country", "website"], "order_by": [{"order_by": "uuid", "order_direction": "desc"}], "limit": 500}, "sliceCount": 4, "pageSize": 1000}}}

request.description: REST: POST /common/jobs/create (export_csv_file, company) → GraphQL: companies.exportCompanies

request.description: REST: POST /common/jobs → GraphQL: jobs.jobs

body.raw: {"query": "query GetJob($jobId:ID!){ jobs{ job(jobId:$jobId){ id jobId userId jobType status requestPayload responsePayload statusPayload createdAt updatedAt}}}", "variables": {"jobId": "{{jobUuid}}"}}

request.description: REST: Get single job by ID
